scopes.name: instance
scopes.description: Action operates on a single subject row of the target class.

inputClassRequiredField.name: id
inputClassRequiredField.documentation: title + description on the property are required.

scopes.name: bulk
scopes.description: Action operates on several rows of the target class atomically.

inputClassRequiredField.name: ids
inputClassRequiredField.documentation: title + description on the property are required.

scopes.guidance: When the caller wants to act on rows matching a filter, they resolve IDs via the filter endpoint client-side and pass them as ids — that is still a bulk action, not a class action.

scopes.name: class
scopes.description: Class-level work that does not key on specific existing rows.
scopes.constraint: Input class must declare NEITHER id nor ids.
scopes.guidance: Use sparingly; most workflows have a natural instance or bulk scope.

selectionRule: Pick the smallest scope that fits the operation.
